title: ZEBRA DS8178 2D HANDHELD WIRELESS BARCODE READER
description: The Zebra DS8178 2D Handheld Wireless Barcode Reader combines advanced hardware with intelligent algorithms to deliver exceptional scanning performance. It instantly captures even the most challenging barcodes—including dense, poorly printed, crinkled, faded, or distorted codes, as well as barcodes displayed on dimly lit screens. With an extended scan range of up to 24 inches (61 cm) and a high-resolution imaging sensor, the DS8178 enhances checkout speed and efficiency. A bright aiming spot ensures fast and accurate targeting, reducing scanning errors and improving workflow in high-demand environments. Built for all-day operation, this scanner provides continuous scanning power for up to 24 hours on a single charge. The Multi-Code Data Formatting (MDF) feature allows users to capture multiple barcodes in one scan and transmit only the required ones, streamlining complex workflows in retail, warehousing, and logistics.
